column59:
If you have completed all of your requirements, you will receive a Certificate of Achievement, which states your dedication towards the improvement of yourself and others around you to empower women, women of color, immigrant and diverse communities. By completing the Internship Round Exit Survey and this survey, you will receive your Certificate at which point you will be considered an Alum of the SPEAKHIRE Foundational Year. Congratulations!

Graduates have the opportunity to move on to our Exploratory Years, which is a self-directed program where we will introduce you to additional Champions and you will be responsible to take what you have learned from the Foundational Program and apply it to build relationships with new professionals. This program is a membership based program, and members are required to pay a monthly fee of anywhere between $75 - $195 per month. [Click here to learn more](https://speakhire.org/exploratory-years). Access to this program is only for those who successfully complete our Foundational Year, proving they:

1. Understand the value of networking
2. Understand the value of people's time
3. Can optimize time and learning with Champions with critical questions
4. Want to develop themselves as strong candidates for colleges and careers to change the face of our future workforce
5. Will serve as a catalyst to lift others up to ensure Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, Belonging, and Accessibility of all voices

If you are interested in joining our Exploratory Years, please reply 'Yes' below.
